description: Completed a 3-month Internship (Magang) at PT PLN (Persero), focusing on the maintenance and troubleshooting of electronic equipment, as well as assisting in the installation and testing of control systems

GPA 3.21 out of 4.00; Focusing on Electronics Engineering with practical expertise in microcontroller programming (Arduino, ESP8266) and PCB layout design (EasyEDA). Strong emphasis on physical hardware implementation, including projects like IoT-based Automated Fertigation Stations and Smart Egg Incubators
